name: Janus Henderson Group plc
name_former: Janus Capital Group and Henderson Group
description: Janus Henderson Group plc is a leading global active asset manager dedicated to helping clients define and achieve superior financial outcomes through differentiated insights, disciplined investments, and world-class service. Formed in 2017 through the merger of Janus Capital Group and Henderson Group, the firm provides a broad range of investment solutions across equities, fixed income, multi-asset, and alternative asset classes. Headquartered in London with its holding company incorporated in Jersey, Janus Henderson serves individual and institutional investors worldwide, leveraging its deep research capabilities to navigate complex market environments and deliver long-term value.
